stat_block.text: A compass helps you Sense Direction or navigate, provided you're in a location with uniform magnetic fields. Without a compass, you take a –2 item penalty to these checks (similar to using a shoddy item).

variants.name: Compass (Lensatic)
variants.text: A lensatic compass gives you a +1 item bonus to these checks.
